scope: Purpose-limited historical runtime reference for Stride 2B.1 QR camera acquisition adaptation only.

files.notes: Exact historical scanner bytes. Authorized only as reference for a new QR-acquisition adaptation; do not copy wholesale into active source, retain Tailwind classes, activate NFC, add global error suppression, or infer Firebase behavior.

Historical dependency provenance only. html5-qrcode may be evaluated as the QR decoding dependency; do not copy or merge this package.json and do not install Firebase, lucide-react, Tailwind, motion, or unrelated historical dependencies from this evidence.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment because the current environment lacks the repository npm dependency installation; AI Studio must run node scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet authorizes reference and adaptation for QR camera acquisition only; it does not authorize wholesale copying of historical Scanner.tsx.

NFC, identifier interpretation, item resolution, navigation, Firebase, Firestore, authentication, persistence, migration, backfill, synchronization, reconciliation, dual-write, fallback, and adapters remain excluded.
Historical Tailwind-style classes, lucide-react, global error suppression, and the full historical package manifest are evidence only and must not be copied into active scan3 source.
Only html5-qrcode may be evaluated as a new dependency in this stride, and only if required by the adapted implementation.
The packet is not a complete legacy application or complete primary source set.
